Plaintiff Terrance A. Forgette'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-05-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TERRANCE A. FORGETTE'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
APPEARANCES: Raymond Milton Alexander, Esq., 415-989-9011, Law Offices of Raymond M. Alexander Plaintiff and Moving Party; James Brandan Kraus, Esq., and Andrew M. Zacks of Zacks, Utrecht & Leadbetter for Defendant and Opposing Party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Counsel to submit prospective orders - Grant/Deny. Hearing exceeded 1 hour - parties assessed $140.00 per diem fees. (302/REQ/PB). Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR # 5220
